caption:
discovering the beauty of Istanbul a journey through it’s iconic neighbourhood ✨🇹🇷🕌🌇🏙️✨ #istanbul #turkey @visit.istanbulofficial 

flying into this vibrant city with @turkishairlines & they offer free hotel stay if you are stopping over in the city 

thank you @ibbturizm @ibb_kultur @gezimanya to have me in the first #istanbultravelinfluencersummit where I had so much fun exploring the city with many influencers from various countries & meeting the Mayor @ekremimamoglu @imamoglu_int 

let me know if you want to know the locations 📍
as I was capturing precious moments with @nikonsg
